vBRIEFInfo.author: overdeck/auto-start
vBRIEFInfo.description: Auto-synthesized minimal plan for PAN-1884: chore(rules): migrate panopticon agent operational rules from conversation-memory into the scope:dev rule/role layer

plan.title: chore(rules): migrate panopticon agent operational rules from conversation-memory into the scope:dev rule/role layer
plan.author: overdeck/auto-start

narratives.Problem:
**PRD:** [`.pan/drafts/pan-1884.md`](https://github.com/eltmon/panopticon-cli/blob/main/.pan/drafts/pan-1884.md) _(v2 — incorporates GPT-5.5 review)_

## Problem

A set of **panopticon agent operational rules** lives **only in the orchestrator's conversation memory** (`~/.claude/projects/.../memory/*.md`) — advisory background for one session, invisible to the work/review/flywheel agents they were written for. Same root cause that let RUN-34 misdiagnose pipeline state (#1883).

## Fix (this issue)

Migrate qualifying memories into the **rule layer**, separating two change classes:
- **(A) tracked repo** — 7 new `sync-sources/rules/*.md` (all `scope: dev`) + flywheel rules added to **both** `roles/flywheel.md` **and** `docs/flywheel-brief.md` (red-main CI-conclusion gate, admin-merge-only-when-green, **cadence fix 1200→~1000**, and **settle the `pan close` contradiction** between the two files). Committed immediately after `pan sync`.
- **(B) local memory** — slim 4 already-promoted memories to pointers; **delete** the stale `planning_artifacts` (cites deleted `.planning/`, `docs/prds/active/`). This is machine-local, **not** in the git commit — reported separately.

Wording guards: `no-oneshot-agents` and `handoff-not-pipeline-agents` must not contradict the existing work-agents-via-pan rule; red-main rule is mechanically checkable (`gh run list --branch main --workflow CI ... --json status,conclusion`). Scope guard: only panopticon-dev agent rules; nothing personal/non-panopticon.

## Related issues
- Addresses the systemic root behind #1883; the migrated red-main/admin-merge rules help the orchestrator avoid the traps that silently empty the merge gate — relating to #1880, #1824, #1783.
- Sibling fixes executed together: #1883, #1877.
narratives.Proposal: Implement the issue directly from the tracker-provided title and body.
